mapper.insert: INSERT INTO circles (id, name, description, avatar_url, owner_id, visibility, status, category, member_count, post_count, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{avatarUrl}, #{ownerId}, #{visibility}, #{status}, #{category}, #{memberCount}, #{postCount}, NOW(3))
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, avatar_url AS avatarUrl, owner_id AS ownerId, visibility, status, category, member_count AS memberCount, post_count AS postCount, created_at AS createdAt FROM circles WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT id, name, description, avatar_url AS avatarUrl, owner_id AS ownerId, visibility, status, category, member_count AS memberCount, post_count AS postCount, created_at AS createdAt FROM circles WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND category = #{category} AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY member_count DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM circles WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND category = #{category} AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.description, c.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, c.owner_id AS ownerId, c.visibility, c.status, c.category, c.member_count AS memberCount, c.post_count AS postCount, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM circles c JOIN circle_members cm ON cm.circle_id = c.id AND cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE c.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY cm.joined_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE circles SET member_count = member_count + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE circles SET post_count = post_count + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
